title: Illinois DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Authoritative — RC-062 Admin Code table + CMS rates)
description: Narrative research notes for Illinois DDS pay: administering agency (IDHS Bureau of Disability Determination Services), the verified Disability Claims Adjudicator series (Trainee 12539 grade 13, I 12537 grade 16, II 12538 grade 18) plus Disability Claims Specialist (12558 grade 19) with RC-062 grade assignments from the official Illinois Administrative Code Table W and monthly/annual figures from the IL CMS AFSCME RC-062 Rates of Pay (Regular Formula Rate, eff July 1, 2025), an effective-date / anti-fabrication methodology note, and AFSCME Council 31 RC-062 (Technical) Master Contract 2023-2027 context. Companion to IL/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Illinois Department of Central Management Services (CMS) / AFSCME Council 31; IL Dept of Human Services (IDHS) Bureau of Disability Determination Services
source.title: IL DDS salary research notes (IL Admin Code Table W RC-062 + CMS AFSCME RC-062 rates eff 2025-07-01, retrieved 2026-06-02)

update_cadence: CBA cycle (2023-2027); IL CMS rates by effective date
notes: Authoritative: RC-062 grade assignments verified from IL Admin Code Table W and monthly rates from the IL CMS AFSCME RC-062 Rates of Pay PDF (Regular Formula Rate), EFFECTIVE JULY 1, 2025 page (current; the future 7/1/2026 page in the same PDF was not used). Extracted locally with pypdf. Corrections: class is 'Disability Claims Adjudicator' (Trainee/I/II); lead is Disability Claims Specialist (grade 19); PSA first-line supervision not separately confirmed. AFSCME Council 31, RC-062 (Technical).
